Package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model

Class Destination

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbAudit
gov.cdc.izgateway.model.AbstractDestination
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model.Destination
All Implemented Interfaces:
gov.cdc.izgateway.common.HasDestinationId, gov.cdc.izgateway.common.HasDestinationUri, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DbAudit, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbEntity, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IDestination, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IEndpoint, Serializable
public class Destination extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.AbstractDestination implements gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbEntity, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IEndpoint, Serializable, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.IDestination
A Destination stored in a Dynamo Database
Author:
Audacious Inquiry
